title: helianthemum variabile var. hololeucum
intro: Helianthemum variabile var. hololeucum, also known as rockrose, is a flowering plant species within the family Cistaceae, characterized by its pink to white flowers and woody stems. Traditionally, rockrose has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential remedy for skin conditions and wounds. The health benefits of rockrose are believed to include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Rockrose can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which may be used to support overall health and well-being.
